background.$description: Page background. Bottom-most surface. HC light n.175 (gris moyen) creuse l'écart avec base/raised pour différencier les 4 surfaces sans recourir à des borders.
Default card / panel surface. HC dark n.25 distingue base de canvas (pur black) sans border.

Elevated surface (modal, popover, tonal button bg, segmented track). Vague 8 — HC vraie hiérarchie : light n.190 (off-white) au-dessus de canvas n.175 ; dark n.75 (gris moyen-clair) au-dessus de base n.25. Pas de texte primaire posé dessus en components.css (vérifié) ; les stories de doc Surfaces affichent du text dessus → ratio AAA limite (6.79) accepté self-référent.

elevation.$description: Subtle elevation pour cards / panels. Sonos-like = 1 layer discret. Marques sans élévation (Notion-like) pointeront ce slot vers shadow.elevation-0 (no-op).

background.$description: Recessed surface (input background, well, code block). Vague 8 — HC vraie hiérarchie : light n.150 (gris foncé creusé) sous canvas n.175 ; dark n.10 (presque-black) sous canvas n.0 (pure black).
Scrim / backdrop for modals. Apply via CSS with 0.6 alpha.

elevation.$description: High elevation pour modals / dialogs full-screen. 2 layers (ambient + key). Marques flat (Notion-like) pointeront ce slot vers shadow.elevation-0.

dim.$description: Surface sombre fixe — track HC SegmentedControl, input HC, etc. Volontairement constante peu importe light/dark/HC : un fond opaque sombre qui distingue par luminance.

bright.$description: Surface claire fixe — tile actif HC SegmentedControl. Volontairement constante. Pendant de surface.dim.

base-hover.$description: Surface.base hover — Donnie pattern. Light = 86%/14% (visible sur fond blanc). Dark = 92%/8% (subtil pour ne pas réduire le contraste avec text-primary clair). Consommé par btn-2:hover, btn-toggle:hover (off).

base-pressed.$description: Surface.base pressed — Donnie pattern. Light = 74%/26% (très marqué). Dark = 84%/16% (modéré, pour ne pas chuter le contraste). Consommé par btn-2:active.

sunken-hover.$description: Surface.sunken hover — Donnie pattern. Light 86%/14%, Dark 92%/8% (subtil). Consommé par inp:hover.

sunken-pressed.$description: Surface.sunken pressed — Donnie pattern. Light 66%/34%, Dark 76%/24%.

default.$description: Standard border (inputs, outlined buttons, segmented track). WCAG 2.4.11 ≥3:1 on base/sunken/raised in light + dark.

focus.$description: Focus ring color. Always visible (accessibility baseline).

default.$description: Brand accent (gold) — decorative fill (idle). Light = accent.125 (mid-tone). Dark = accent.150 (plus clair, lift sur fond sombre). Vision daltonisme : tritanopia mappe sur orange (jaune indistinguable), achromatopsia mappe sur text-primary (luminance-only). Deutéranopie/protanopie : pas d'override (gold OK).

pressed.$description: Brand accent (gold) — pressed (darkened). Fallback Penpot: accent.100. Consommé par btn-toggle.active:active.

placeholder.$description: Placeholder text. Empty-state hints in inputs. AA on sunken (light 6.07, dark 6.75); AAA on HC (n.10 sur sunken n.150 light, n.190 sur sunken n.10 dark).

disabled.$description: Disabled text. Controls that can't be interacted with. AA on sunken (light 6.07, dark 6.75); AAA on HC (n.10 sur sunken n.150 light, n.190 sur sunken n.10 dark). Distinguishable from primary via opacity 0.5 in components.css.

inverse.$description: Text on solid/colored surfaces (e.g. white on primary).

accent.$description: Accent text. Inline links, brand emphasis.

on-accent.$description: Text on top of the accent (gold) surface — e.g. .btn-toggle.active. Default = neutral.0 (black) sur gold. Vision achromatopsia : accent bascule en grayscale, donc on-accent doit s'inverser pour conserver le contraste. Light ach : accent=neutral.25 (sombre) → on-accent=neutral.200 (clair). Dark ach : accent=neutral.190 (clair) → on-accent=neutral.25 (sombre).

on-dim.$description: Text on surface.dim — white fixe. Pendant de on-accent pour la surface sombre fixe (HC SegCtrl track, input HC).

on-bright.$description: Text on surface.bright — black fixe. Pendant de on-dim pour la surface claire fixe (HC SegCtrl tile active).

small.$description: Small body. Secondary copy, dense UI.

body.emphasis.$description: Body emphasis. Same size as body, heavier weight for emphasis.

subheading.$description: Subheading. Section labels inside a page.

display-small.$description: Small display. Marketing or hero subtitles.

code.$description: Monospace code / stream URLs / log output.

bg.$description: Success state (completed action, OK) — background tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : bg saturé (light n.50, dark n.150) inversé pour atteindre 3:1 vs canvas (badge claque).

text.$description: Success state (completed action, OK) — text on the tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : text inversé (light n.190, dark n.0) pour AAA contre le bg HC saturé.

bg-hover.$description: Status.success.bg hover — Donnie pattern (currentColor 8%). Fallback: success.175.

bg-pressed.$description: Status.success.bg pressed — Donnie pattern (currentColor 18%). Fallback: success.150.

bg.$description: Warning state (caution, non-blocking issue) — background tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : bg saturé (light n.50, dark n.150) inversé pour atteindre 3:1 vs canvas (badge claque).

text.$description: Warning state (caution, non-blocking issue) — text on the tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : text inversé (light n.190, dark n.0) pour AAA contre le bg HC saturé.

bg-hover.$description: Status.warning.bg hover — Donnie pattern (currentColor 8%). Fallback: warning.175.

bg-pressed.$description: Status.warning.bg pressed — Donnie pattern (currentColor 18%). Fallback: warning.150.

bg.$description: Danger state (error, destructive action) — background tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : bg saturé (light n.50, dark n.150) inversé pour atteindre 3:1 vs canvas (badge claque).

text.$description: Danger state (error, destructive action) — text on the tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : text inversé (light n.190, dark n.0) pour AAA contre le bg HC saturé.

bg-hover.$description: Status.danger.bg hover — Donnie pattern (currentColor 8%). Fallback: danger.175.

bg-pressed.$description: Status.danger.bg pressed — Donnie pattern (currentColor 18%). Fallback: danger.150.

bg.$description: Info state (neutral notice, informational) — background tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : bg saturé (light n.50, dark n.150) inversé pour atteindre 3:1 vs canvas (badge claque).

text.$description: Info state (neutral notice, informational) — text on the tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : text inversé (light n.190, dark n.0) pour AAA contre le bg HC saturé.

bg-hover.$description: Status.info.bg hover — Donnie pattern (currentColor 8%). Fallback: info.175.

bg-pressed.$description: Status.info.bg pressed — Donnie pattern (currentColor 18%). Fallback: info.150.

tight.$description: Tight gap. Between adjacent visual elements sharing a conceptual unit.

snug.$description: Snug gap. Inner padding of controls (buttons, inputs).

default.$description: Default gap. Between distinct elements on a surface.

circle.$description: Circle. Avatars, round buttons. Applied as raw percentage.

sm.$description: Small icon. Inline with body text.

lg.$description: Large icon. Feature blocks, empty states.

offset.$description: Focus ring offset from the element edge.
